g.title: biblio.record_note:record->biblio.record_entry:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (record) REFERENCES biblio.record_entry(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: biblio.record_note:creator->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (creator) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: biblio.record_note:editor->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (editor) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
